description_long: This is a classic arcade claw machine, commonly known as 'The Claw,' featuring a rectangular glass enclosure filled with colorful plush toys. The upper section displays a prominent marquee with glowing green letters spelling 'THE CLAW' against a blue background. The front lower section houses a control panel with a joystick, a red button, and a coin slot, as well as a prize retrieval door. The machine's body is primarily blue with a matte finish, and the interior is visible through clear glass panels on all sides. The mechanical claw is suspended from the top inside, poised above the toys, ready to be maneuvered by players.
description: A blue arcade claw machine with a glass enclosure, filled with plush toys and featuring a glowing 'THE CLAW' marquee and a control panel with joystick and button.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, control panel with joystick, button, coin slot, and the plush toys inside.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled top, glass side panel, and a partial view of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain blue back panel and the plush toys inside through the glass.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the angled top, glass side panel, and a side perspective of the control panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and one red button, both positioned on a gray control panel with a visible coin slot.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features bold, glowing green text 'THE CLAW' on a blue background, with no additional imagery.
